creator: mike.english@gmail.com
text:
Note that the 3.8.0.0 tarball is again available from https://www.gnuradio.org/releases/gnuradio/ and the volk dependency (a submodule in the git repo) is included so we can do away with USES_GITHUB and go back to building from the official release tarball.

I've run this through portlint and poudriere already, so it should apply cleanly.
